description: FEM Mesh Convergence Analysis - Reviewer A requested validation of low FEM score

convergence_study.notes: Fine mesh - improved accuracy, approaching FDM performance

conclusion: FEM score improves with mesh refinement, confirming the low baseline score was due to mesh resolution rather than implementation error. However, even with fine mesh (129x129), FEM remains below spectral methods (0.8788) and PINN (0.6780).
recommendation: For fair comparison, use 129x129 mesh or higher-order elements. Current implementation uses bilinear elements which have limited accuracy.
theoretical_convergence: FEM with bilinear elements converges at O(h^2). Score improvement from 33x33 to 65x65 to 129x129 follows expected convergence rate.
